title: Operator domain expansion in second metro
whatChanged: A major robotaxi operator announced expanded nighttime operations in a second U.S. city, with reference to improved remote-assistance protocols.
implication: Supports base-to-bull path on regulatory learning curves and operational maturity, with emphasis on repeatable playbooks rather than one-off pilots.
action: No change to position sizes; increase weight on regulatory milestone KPI in quarterly review.

title: Insurer earnings: mixed loss-ratio commentary
whatChanged: Large personal-auto writers cited weather and severity noise; few cited structural frequency improvement from ADS exposure in the pool.
implication: Short personal-lines thesis remains early; risk of false negatives around timing. Thesis intact but requires smaller sizing until data coheres.
action: Mark short exposure under review; tighten stop framework on next two prints.

title: OEM autonomy spend commentary
whatChanged: Multiple OEMs emphasized near-term ADAS monetization and deferred explicit L4 city expansion targets.
implication: Challenges leg of thesis leaning on broad OEM transformation as a near-term catalyst; reinforces preference for compute and fleet-first operators.
action: Exit legacy OEM long thesis (Ford) and recycle capital into higher-conviction enabler exposure.

title: Initial framework live
whatChanged: Published monitoring framework alongside case study draft; defined KPI set and falsification conditions.
implication: Establishes baseline discipline for updates; future entries should reference KPI deltas where possible.
